title: FOI release: detainees and withdrawal of aid to Sierra Leone
body: "FOI 0296-16 releases documents about the execution of detainees at Pademba Road Jail, Freetown, Sierra Leone in 1992.  It also releases the Secretary of State, Douglas Hurd’s, public statement in Nigeria, January 1993, withdrawing the offer of programme aid which was £4 million sterling in balance of payments support "
